title: AI weather models show promise for hurricane forecasts, but new study finds key physical limitations
description: Artificial intelligence is rapidly transforming weather prediction, enabling forecasts that once required hours of supercomputing time to run in just minutes. But as AI tools play an expanding role in high-stakes hazard modeling, researchers at Rice University say an essential question remains: Do AI-generated storms behave realistically?

title: Pentagon Opens Door to Anthropic Use Beyond 6-Month Phaseout
description: According to an internal memo, the Pentagon has told its senior leaders that use of Anthropic's artificial intelligence tools may continue beyond a previously announced six-month phaseout if deemed critical to national security.
content:

title: Why is Atlassian going to lay off 10% workforce, and will software provider's 1,600 jobs cut announcement push company's shares upwards or downwards?
description: Why is Atlassian going to lay off 10% workforce, and will software provider's 1,600 jobs cut announcement push company's shares upwards or downwards?
